items.reasoning: Sustain through Stifling Dagger and Frost Arrows chip damage in a dual physical lane.
+2 armor directly reduces PA Dagger and Drow right-click physical damage.
Axe needs to cut creep waves behind enemy tower for Counter Helix procs.
Cheap stats; Axe's base HP regen benefits from every point of STR.
70% chance to block 70 damage per hit. PA attacks fast with low base damage -- Vanguard neutralizes her.
Close gap to PA for Counter Helix trades; she wants range with Dagger.
PA Dagger spam generates wand charges. 3-4 charges per minute.
Blink + Call catches PA and Drow together. 3.2s taunt forces them to attack you (Counter Helix procs).
PA Coup de Grace crits reflected back for 2000+ damage. She literally kills herself attacking you during Call.
+10 armor aura helps entire team vs PA + Drow physical. -5 enemy armor amplifies team damage.
5000+ HP pool makes Axe unkillable between fights. Counter Helix scales with survival time.
150% STR damage on landing + AoE slow. Axe's 3000+ HP pool means 4500 bonus AoE damage.
If enemy supports chain-stun you before Call, BKB ensures Blink + Call lands.
AoE attack speed slow cripples both PA and Drow. +15 armor stacks with AC.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Axe hard-counters physical carries. Vanguard negates PA's lane damage, Blade Mail reflects Coup de Grace crits during Call. Blink + Call + Blade Mail combo kills PA outright. Stack armor with AC and Shiva's to become immune to physical damage in late game teamfights.
